gradeDescription: A = I excelled at everything I did today!
whatIDidToday: played with as many buddies as possible
noteworthyComments: Today I worked on puppy push-ups (sit-down-sit) and turned them into my own little workout session 💪🐶 I popped up, dropped down, and popped right back up again like a pro. It was a fun way to burn energy, use my brain, and show off my quick moves ✨🐾
